kiro_plan:
Two parallel tracks, in this order:

Track A — correctness/reliability bugs (do first, highest ROI): T134 (inventory stock race, ~select_for_update), T135 (Telegram retry policy), T136 (idempotency lock via cache.add), T137 (PII log redaction). Each of these is a self-contained ~150-line change with a matching regression test. Ship as one plan cycle covering all four; they don't collide.

Track B — feature gap: T133 (TreatmentForm + photo gallery UI). This is the largest single task — three files worth of code (route, page, form component) plus Playwright coverage. Do it in a dedicated build iteration so the reviewer can inspect the UX flow in one review pass.

After Track A + B land: T138 (paginate commissions/notifications/stock logs), T139 (reports cache bust), T140 (extend /readyz/ to Celery broker), T141 (frontend page tests batch). Then polish tasks: T142 (access audit), T143 (functional index + backup rotation), T144 (bundle-size CI budget).

Builder guidance for the correctness tasks:
- T134: use `with transaction.atomic(): material = Material.objects.select_for_update().get(pk=material.pk); if quantity_used > material.quantity_in_stock: raise ValidationError(...)`. Do NOT rely on the signal path to hold the lock; do the guard + decrement in the same transaction inside record_usage itself. Move apply_usage_to_stock's guard logic there too or invoke it synchronously with the lock still held.
- T135: use celery's `autoretry_for=(...)` on `@shared_task` instead of manual try/except. Keep `mark_failed` only on the terminal `MaxRetriesExceededError` handler set via `throws` or a `on_failure` hook.
- T136: lock key format `idem-lock:{fingerprint}` distinct from `idem:{fingerprint}`; TTL 30s (long enough for one request, short enough to auto-heal a crashed writer).
- T137: place the filter in the logging config's `filters` dict and reference it from every handler; do NOT put it in the formatter (formatters run per-handler and are not the right layer for mutation).

Builder guidance for T133: PatientDetailPage already has a `photos` tab — replace its body with a component that calls the new (aggregated) `useAllPhotosForPatient` hook (implement it by iterating over the patient's treatments from the history endpoint and merging listTreatmentPhotos results). New route `/patients/:pid/treatments/:tid` renders TreatmentDetailPage which embeds TreatmentForm in edit mode + a photos section + a tooth-records section (reuse Odontogram in editable mode from PatientDetailPage). Guard the route to `doctor + bosh_shifokor`.

Do NOT touch agentloop.toml or ai_orchestrator/orchestrator.py during any of these — per .kiro/steering/runner_lifecycle.md the T116 patch has already landed and further edits reproduce the plan_02–05 failure loop.
